9001.name: Gates of the Afterlife
9001.description: Massive golden gates stand between the living and the dead. A robed figure checks a very long list.

9002.name: Spirit Path — West
9002.description: A path of clouds stretches westward. Souls drift past like leaves on a river.

9003.name: Spirit Path — Central
9003.description: The main road of the afterlife. Spirits of all kinds travel here. Some remember who they were.

9004.name: Spirit Path — East
9004.description: The path narrows and descends. The light dims. This way leads to darker places.

9005.name: Heaven's Garden
9005.description: An impossible garden of perfect flowers. The temperature is always comfortable. Peace radiates.

9006.name: Hall of Heroes
9006.description: Statues of the greatest warriors who ever lived. Their spirits train here eternally.

9007.name: The Judgment Hall
9007.description: A vast courtroom where deeds are weighed. The scales are impossibly precise.

9008.name: Purgatory — Waiting Room
9008.description: Uncomfortable chairs and old magazines. The wait is eternal. A number dispenser reads '∞.'

9009.name: The Dark Descent
9009.description: Stairs spiral downward into increasing darkness. Wailing echoes from below.

9010.name: Elysian Fields
9010.description: Rolling green hills under a perpetual golden sunset. The worthy rest here in peace.

9011.name: Training Grounds of the Dead
9011.description: Spirits of warriors spar endlessly. Death has not dulled their skills. If anything, they've improved.

9012.name: The Crossroads of Souls
9012.description: Where paths diverge. Up leads to light. Down leads to shadow. Sideways leads to rebirth.

9013.name: Limbo — Grey Expanse
9013.description: An endless grey plain. Nothing happens here. Nothing ever will. The ultimate punishment: boredom.

9014.name: Hell's Gate
9014.description: A gate of black iron radiating heat. Screams from beyond. A demon bouncer checks the list.

9015.name: The Reincarnation Pool
9015.description: A pool of swirling silver light. Souls step in and emerge as something new. Somewhere new.

9016.name: Snake Way — Start
9016.description: A narrow winding path above clouds. One misstep and you fall to the realm below. It stretches for miles.

9017.name: Snake Way — Middle
9017.description: The path continues endlessly. Your legs burn. The end is not visible. Keep going.

9018.name: Snake Way — End
9018.description: Finally. The path widens to a small planet floating in the void. A tiny house sits on top.

9019.name: The Forgotten Shore
9019.description: A beach of grey sand beside a grey sea. Souls who were forgotten by the living wash up here.

9020.name: King Kai's Planet
9020.description: A tiny planet with its own gravity. A small house, a car, and a monkey. The master trains only the worthy.

9021.name: The Void Between
9021.description: The space between life and death. Nothing exists here. Not even nothing. It's less than nothing.

9022.name: The Final Gate
9022.description: Beyond this, even spirits cannot return. Whatever lies past is truly the end. Or the beginning.

4001.name: Firebase Alpha — Command
4001.description: A reinforced bunker with maps and radios. The CO barks orders. Shells land in the distance.

4002.name: Firebase Alpha — Armory
4002.description: Racks of weapons behind chain-link. The quartermaster logs everything. Everything.

4003.name: Firebase Alpha — Barracks
4003.description: Rows of cots. Personal effects tucked under pillows. Letters from home pinned to the walls.

4004.name: Firebase Alpha — Mess Hall
4004.description: Long tables and the smell of reconstituted food. A TV plays news nobody watches.

4005.name: Firebase Alpha — Motor Pool
4005.description: Vehicles in various states of repair. A mechanic curses at an engine. Oil stains everything.

4006.name: Firebase Alpha — Helipad
4006.description: A concrete pad with painted circles. The wind from rotors never fully dies here.

4007.name: Perimeter — West Tower
4007.description: A guard tower with sandbags and a mounted gun. The view shows nothing but wasteland.

4008.name: Perimeter — West Gate
4008.description: A checkpoint with concrete barriers. Razor wire tops the walls. Papers are checked twice.

4009.name: Perimeter — North Wall
4009.description: The main wall facing enemy territory. Bullet holes pockmark the concrete.

4010.name: Perimeter — East Gate
4010.description: The supply gate. Convoys come and go under heavy guard.

4011.name: Perimeter — East Tower
4011.description: Another guard tower. Binoculars scan the horizon. Something moved out there.

4012.name: Wasteland — Crater Field
4012.description: Shell craters overlap like a diseased moonscape. Nothing grows here. Nothing should.

4013.name: Wasteland — Burned Forest
4013.description: Charred tree trunks stand like black fingers. Ash crunches underfoot.

4014.name: No Man's Land — West
4014.description: The space between the lines. Barbed wire and unexploded ordnance. Every step could be your last.

4015.name: No Man's Land — Center
4015.description: A destroyed tank sits in the middle of the field. Both sides use it as a landmark.

4016.name: No Man's Land — East
4016.description: More wire, more craters. A boot sticks out of the mud. Nobody claims it.

4017.name: Wasteland — Minefield
4017.description: Warning signs in three languages. Some of the signs have been moved. Deliberately.

4018.name: Wasteland — Sniper Alley
4018.description: A long straight road between ruined buildings. Everyone runs here. Not everyone makes it.

4019.name: Ruined Village — West
4019.description: What was once a home. The walls still stand but the roof is gone. Family photos in the rubble.

4020.name: Ruined Village — Center
4020.description: The village square. A fountain with no water. A clock tower with no hands.

4021.name: Ruined Village — East
4021.description: A destroyed school. Tiny desks overturned. Crayon drawings on the remaining wall.

4022.name: Trench — Junction
4022.description: Where three trenches meet. Sandbags and wooden supports. The mud is knee-deep.

4023.name: Trench — East
4023.description: A long trench heading east. Duckboards keep you above the worst of the water.

4024.name: Trench — Bunker
4024.description: A reinforced position dug into the trench wall. Room for four. Smells like fear.

4025.name: Observation Post
4025.description: A camouflaged position on high ground. Radio equipment and binoculars.

4026.name: Destroyed Bridge
4026.description: A bridge blown in half. The river below is toxic green. The other side is enemy territory.

4027.name: River Crossing — Shallow
4027.description: A fordable point in the river. The current is strong. Bullets have a way of finding you here.

4028.name: Enemy Trench — Outer
4028.description: You've crossed the line. Their trenches mirror yours. Same mud, different flag.

4029.name: Enemy Trench — Inner
4029.description: Deeper into enemy lines. Abandoned equipment suggests a hasty retreat. Or a trap.

4030.name: Enemy Bunker — Exterior
4030.description: A concrete bunker built into a hillside. The door is reinforced steel. Bullet scars everywhere.

4031.name: Bombed Highway
4031.description: A six-lane highway reduced to rubble. Overturned vehicles form a maze.

4032.name: Refugee Camp — Outskirts
4032.description: Tents and tarps stretch for acres. The displaced and the desperate. Aid workers do what they can.

4033.name: Refugee Camp — Center
4033.description: A medical tent and a food distribution point. The line never ends.

4034.name: Enemy Base — Perimeter
4034.description: Their base. Similar to yours but with different insignia. The irony isn't lost on anyone.

4035.name: Enemy Base — Interior
4035.description: Inside their wire. Barracks and motor pools. A mirror image of home.

4036.name: Mountain Road — Base
4036.description: A winding road begins its ascent into the mountains. Switchbacks visible above.

4037.name: Mountain Road — Switchback
4037.description: A hairpin turn on the mountain road. The drop is fatal. Guardrails are optional.

4038.name: Mountain Pass — Checkpoint
4038.description: A fortified position controlling the pass. Whoever holds this controls movement.

4039.name: Mountain Cave — Entrance
4039.description: A natural cave system. Used as shelter, storage, or worse. Darkness within.

4040.name: Mountain Cave — Deep
4040.description: Deep in the cave system. Stalactites drip. Crates of weapons are stacked against the walls.

4041.name: Underground Facility — Entrance
4041.description: A blast door set into the mountainside. Military markings. Top secret classification.

4042.name: Underground Facility — Lab
4042.description: A research facility. Containment units and hazmat suits. What were they working on?

4043.name: Underground Facility — Arsenal
4043.description: A weapons cache that could arm a small country. Some of these shouldn't exist.

4044.name: Irradiated Zone — Edge
4044.description: Geiger counters click rapidly. The ground is glass in places. A failed weapon test.

4045.name: Irradiated Zone — Center
4045.description: The epicenter. A crater of fused sand. The air shimmers with heat that isn't heat.

4046.name: Irradiated Zone — Bunker
4046.description: A survival bunker. Sealed for decades. The door has been forced open from the inside.

4047.name: Crashed Aircraft
4047.description: A transport plane broken in half. Cargo scattered across the desert. The black box still beeps.

4048.name: Desert Outpost
4048.description: A lonely watchtower in the sand. One soldier on rotation. They haven't been relieved in weeks.

4049.name: Oasis
4049.description: An impossible green spot in the wasteland. Fresh water. Palm trees. It feels like a trap because it might be.

4050.name: Arms Dealer's Camp
4050.description: A collection of tents and vehicles. The dealer sells to both sides. Business is good.

4100.name: Bunker — Blast Door
4100.description: A massive blast door, partially open. The hydraulics have failed. You squeeze through.

4101.name: Bunker — Decontamination
4101.description: Chemical showers and UV lights. A sign reads: 'ALL PERSONNEL MUST DECONTAMINATE.'

4102.name: Bunker — Reception
4102.description: A security desk with shattered monitors. Bullet holes in the wall behind it.

4103.name: Bunker — Armory
4103.description: Weapon racks, mostly empty. What remains is experimental. Serial numbers filed off.

4104.name: Bunker — Barracks
4104.description: Rows of bunks. Some still have personal effects. Photos of families. Letters never sent.

4105.name: Bunker — Mess Hall
4105.description: A cafeteria frozen in time. Trays of petrified food. The vending machine still works somehow.

4106.name: Bunker — Command Center
4106.description: A war room with a massive tactical display. Red dots everywhere. The situation was dire.

4107.name: Bunker — Communications
4107.description: Radio equipment. Static on every frequency. One channel plays music from decades ago.

4108.name: Bunker — Medical Bay
4108.description: An operating theater. Surgical tools laid out. The patient left mid-procedure.

4109.name: Bunker — Generator Room
4109.description: Diesel generators hum. Fuel is low. When it runs out, the lights go forever.

4110.name: Bunker — Server Room
4110.description: Military servers still processing. Classified data scrolls across screens. Eyes only.

4111.name: Bunker — Research Lab
4111.description: Biological containment units. Most are intact. One is broken. The contents are gone.

4112.name: Bunker — Cold Storage
4112.description: Freezers at -40. Biological samples. Some are labeled. Some are deliberately unlabeled.

4113.name: Bunker — Escape Tunnel
4113.description: A narrow tunnel with emergency lighting. It leads somewhere outside the base perimeter.

4114.name: Sub-Level — Stairwell
4114.description: Stairs descend further. The walls change from concrete to bedrock. This wasn't in the plans.

4115.name: Sub-Level — Containment
4115.description: A room designed to hold something. The restraints are massive. They've been broken.

4116.name: Sub-Level — Project Room
4116.description: Files marked 'PROJECT PROMETHEUS.' Whatever they made, it got out.

4117.name: Deep Storage — Vault
4117.description: A bank vault door. Inside: crates marked with radiation symbols and 'DO NOT OPEN UNTIL 2099.'

4118.name: Deep Storage — Archive
4118.description: Filing cabinets of classified documents. Decades of secrets. Some pages are redacted entirely.

4119.name: The Pit
4119.description: The deepest point. A shaft drilled into the earth. Something is down there. Something is coming up.

5001.name: The Apex
5001.description: The highest point reachable. Stars surround you in every direction. A single crystal floats here, pulsing with light.

5002.name: Star Garden
5002.description: Miniature stars orbit a central point like a mobile. Each one hums a different note.

5003.name: Crystal Shard — North
5003.description: A floating platform of pure crystal. It rings like a bell when you step on it. The void stretches below.

5004.name: The Observatory Shard
5004.description: A shard with a massive telescope pointed at something specific. The lens is cracked but still functional.

5005.name: Library Shard
5005.description: Books float in zero gravity around a reading chair. Knowledge from dead worlds preserved in amber light.

5006.name: The Singing Stones
5006.description: Tall crystalline pillars that vibrate with harmonic frequencies. Standing between them is transcendent.

5007.name: Vine Bridge — West
5007.description: A bridge of living vines spans the void between shards. It sways gently. Don't look down.

5008.name: Garden Shard — North
5008.description: An impossible garden floating in space. Flowers that shouldn't exist bloom in colors with no name.

5009.name: Central Nexus Shard
5009.description: The largest shard — a floating island the size of a city block. Paths radiate outward in every direction.

5010.name: Garden Shard — East
5010.description: More impossible flora. A tree grows upside down, its roots reaching for stars instead of soil.

5011.name: Vine Bridge — East
5011.description: Another living bridge. This one has thorns. They retract as you approach. Mostly.

5012.name: Isolated Shard — Far West
5012.description: A tiny shard barely large enough to stand on. The view is vertigo-inducing and beautiful.

5013.name: Waterfall Shard
5013.description: Water falls from nowhere, pools briefly on this shard, then cascades off the edge into nothing.

5014.name: Marketplace Shard
5014.description: Beings from different realities trade here. Currency is abstract — memories, emotions, time.

5015.name: The Great Bridge
5015.description: A massive stone bridge connecting the central shard to the southern archipelago. Statues line its rails.

5016.name: Clockwork Shard
5016.description: A shard made entirely of gears and mechanisms. They turn endlessly, measuring something.

5017.name: Mirror Shard
5017.description: The surface is perfectly reflective. Your reflection moves a half-second behind you.

5018.name: Broken Shard — Edge
5018.description: A shard that's crumbling. Pieces drift away slowly. It won't last much longer.

5019.name: The Void — West Pocket
5019.description: A bubble of breathable air in the void. Nothing else. Just you and the stars.

5020.name: Mushroom Shard
5020.description: Giant luminescent mushrooms grow from this shard. Their spores drift upward like reverse snow.

5021.name: Residential Shard — West
5021.description: Small dwellings built from void-crystal. Beings who chose to live between worlds.

5022.name: The Amphitheater
5022.description: A natural bowl in a large shard. Seats carved from crystal. Performances happen when reality allows.

5023.name: Residential Shard — East
5023.description: More dwellings. A communal kitchen. The smell of cooking that defies physics.

5024.name: Forge Shard
5024.description: A blacksmith works void-metal on an anvil of compressed starlight. Sparks fall upward.

5025.name: Broken Shard — Interior
5025.description: The inside of the crumbling shard. Tunnels riddle it like worm-eaten wood. Unstable.

5026.name: Gravity Well — Edge
5026.description: Gravity gets stronger here. A collapsed shard forms a dense core that pulls things inward.

5027.name: The Descent — Upper
5027.description: A spiral staircase carved from a single crystal descends into deeper void.

5028.name: The Descent — Mid
5028.description: Halfway down the spiral. The light from above is fading. New light glows from below — red.

5029.name: The Descent — Lower
5029.description: Near the bottom. The red glow is stronger. Heat rises. Something burns below.

5030.name: Gravity Well — Core
5030.description: The collapsed shard's core. Gravity is twice normal. Movement is exhausting. Treasures are compressed here.

5031.name: Dark Shard — Surface
5031.description: A shard that absorbs light. Everything is visible only in silhouette. Sound is muffled.

5032.name: Dark Shard — Caves
5032.description: Tunnels within the dark shard. Bioluminescent creatures provide the only light.

5033.name: The Furnace Shard
5033.description: A shard of molten rock. Lava flows in channels. The heat is barely survivable.

5034.name: The Furnace — Core
5034.description: The heart of the burning shard. A phoenix nests here in eternal flame.

5035.name: Ice Shard — Surface
5035.description: A shard of pure ice. The cold is absolute. Your breath freezes before it leaves your lips.

5036.name: Ice Shard — Caverns
5036.description: Inside the ice shard. Frozen creatures are visible within the walls. Some look recent.

5037.name: The Graveyard of Shards
5037.description: Fragments of destroyed shards drift here. A memorial to worlds that ended.

5038.name: The Anchor Point
5038.description: A massive chain extends downward into absolute darkness. Something is tethered below.

5039.name: The Whispering Void
5039.description: Voices echo here from nowhere. Fragments of conversations from other realities bleed through.

5040.name: Temporal Shard
5040.description: Time moves differently here. You can see yourself arriving and leaving simultaneously.

5041.name: The Abyss — Edge
5041.description: The void gets darker here. Stars are fewer. Something vast moves in the darkness below.

5042.name: The Abyss — Descent
5042.description: Falling — or is it flying? Direction loses meaning. The darkness is absolute.

5043.name: The Abyss — Floor
5043.description: There is a bottom. It's soft, organic, warm. It breathes. You're standing on something alive.

5044.name: The Dreaming Shard
5044.description: A shard where reality is shaped by thought. The landscape shifts with your emotions.

5045.name: The Forgotten Shard
5045.description: A shard that everyone forgets the moment they leave. Notes are pinned everywhere: 'REMEMBER THIS PLACE.'

5046.name: The Origin Point
5046.description: Where the first shard broke from the original world. Cracks in reality radiate outward from a single point.

5100.name: Deep Void — Entry
5100.description: Below the abyss floor. The living thing you stood on has an underside. It's covered in eyes.

5101.name: Deep Void — Tendril Path
5101.description: Organic tendrils form a path through absolute darkness. They pulse with bioluminescence.

5102.name: Void Pocket — Memories
5102.description: A bubble of reality containing someone's memories. You can walk through their life.

5103.name: Void Pocket — Dreams
5103.description: A bubble of pure dream-stuff. Reality is whatever you imagine. Dangerous.

5104.name: Void Pocket — Nightmares
5104.description: A bubble of concentrated fear. Your worst memories given form. Face them or flee.

5105.name: Void Pocket — Time
5105.description: A bubble where time flows backward. You see the end before the beginning.

5106.name: The Womb of Worlds
5106.description: Where new realities gestate. Proto-universes bubble and pop. Some survive.

5107.name: The Dead God's Corpse — Head
5107.description: You're standing on something that was once divine. Its skull is a continent.

5108.name: The Dead God's Corpse — Heart
5108.description: The heart still beats. Once per century. The next beat is soon.

5109.name: The Dead God's Corpse — Hand
5109.description: A hand the size of a mountain, fingers curled. Something is clutched in the fist.

5110.name: Primordial Ocean
5110.description: An ocean of liquid potential. Before matter, before energy, there was this.

5111.name: The First Light
5111.description: A single point of light in infinite darkness. The first photon ever created. Still shining.

5112.name: The Last Thought
5112.description: The final thought of the dead god. It echoes eternally. It sounds like a question.

5113.name: The Seed
5113.description: A seed of pure creation. Plant it anywhere and a new world grows. Handle with care.

5114.name: The Edge of Everything
5114.description: Beyond this, nothing exists. Not void. Not darkness. Not even the concept of 'beyond.'

5115.name: The Mirror of Worlds
5115.description: A surface that shows other realities. Some are similar. Some are horrifying. One is watching back.

6001.name: Temporal Nexus — Hub
6001.description: A chamber where all timelines converge. Clocks of every era line the walls, all showing different times. All correct.

6002.name: Temporal Nexus — Archives
6002.description: Scrolls, tablets, hard drives — records from every age stored in temporal stasis.

6003.name: Roman Colosseum — Gate
6003.description: The roar of the crowd echoes through stone tunnels. Gladiators prepare for combat ahead.

6004.name: Roman Colosseum — Arena Floor
6004.description: Sand stained dark. The crowd demands blood. Lions pace in cages beneath the stands.

6005.name: Roman Forum
6005.description: Marble columns and political speeches. Senators debate while the empire crumbles around them.

6006.name: Roman Bathhouse
6006.description: Steam rises from heated pools. Mosaics depict conquests. Whispered conspiracies echo off tile.

6007.name: Roman Aqueduct
6007.description: A massive stone waterway stretches across the landscape. Engineering that will outlast the empire.

6008.name: Egyptian Market — Bazaar
6008.description: Spices, gold, and papyrus. Merchants haggle in the shadow of monuments to dead gods.

6009.name: Temple of Ra
6009.description: A massive temple to the sun god. Gold leaf catches the light. Priests chant in ancient tongues.

6010.name: The Sphinx — Base
6010.description: The great sphinx stares eastward with knowing eyes. Sand piles against its paws.

6011.name: Pyramid — Entrance
6011.description: The entrance to the great pyramid. Cool air flows from within. Hieroglyphs warn of curses.

6012.name: Pyramid — Interior
6012.description: Narrow passages lead deeper. Torchlight reveals painted walls telling stories of the afterlife.

6013.name: Pyramid — Burial Chamber
6013.description: The pharaoh's final resting place. Gold and treasures surround the sarcophagus. The air is ancient.

6014.name: Bamboo Forest — Path
6014.description: Tall bamboo sways overhead, creating a green tunnel. The path is worn smooth by countless feet.

6015.name: Bamboo Forest — Clearing
6015.description: A small clearing with a stone lantern. Cherry blossoms drift on the breeze despite no trees nearby.

6016.name: Feudal Village — Gate
6016.description: A torii gate marks the entrance to a small village. Paper lanterns glow in the twilight.

6017.name: Feudal Village — Center
6017.description: Thatched-roof houses surround a central well. A samurai meditates beneath a maple tree.

6018.name: Dojo — Exterior
6018.description: A traditional training hall. The sound of wooden swords clashing comes from within.

6019.name: Dojo — Interior
6019.description: Polished wooden floors. Weapons racks line the walls. A master corrects a student's form.

6020.name: Castle — Approach
6020.description: A winding path leads up to a Japanese castle. Multiple tiers of curved roofs rise above.

6021.name: Fjord — Shore
6021.description: A rocky beach at the base of towering cliffs. Longships are beached here, dragon prows facing the sea.

6022.name: Viking Village — Docks
6022.description: A wooden dock where warriors load supplies. The smell of salt and tar.

6023.name: Viking Village — Mead Hall
6023.description: A massive wooden hall. A fire pit runs its length. Warriors feast and boast of battles.

6024.name: Viking Village — Forge
6024.description: A blacksmith hammers a sword on an anvil. Runes are carved into every blade.

6025.name: Runestone Hill
6025.description: A hilltop covered in ancient runestones. Each tells a saga. The wind reads them aloud.

6026.name: Sacred Grove
6026.description: An ancient grove where the Norse gods are worshipped. Offerings hang from branches.

6027.name: Desert Road — Caravan
6027.description: A trade caravan rests here. Camels and merchants from distant lands. Spices scent the air.

6028.name: Desert Fortress — Gate
6028.description: A massive stone fortress rises from the sand. Crusader banners fly from the battlements.

6029.name: Desert Fortress — Courtyard
6029.description: Knights in full plate sweat in the desert heat. A well provides precious water.

6030.name: Desert Fortress — Chapel
6030.description: A small stone chapel. Stained glass casts colored light on worn pews. Prayer and war coexist.

6031.name: Desert Fortress — Tower
6031.description: The highest point. The desert stretches endlessly. Dust clouds on the horizon — an army approaches.

6032.name: Jungle Path — Overgrown
6032.description: Dense jungle presses in from all sides. Macaws screech overhead. The humidity is suffocating.

6033.name: Jungle Path — River Crossing
6033.description: A rope bridge spans a rushing river. The wood is slippery. Crocodiles wait below.

6034.name: Aztec City — Outskirts
6034.description: The jungle gives way to cultivated land. Terraced farms and irrigation channels.

6035.name: Aztec City — Market
6035.description: A vast marketplace. Cacao, obsidian, feathers, and jade. The currency is cacao beans.

6036.name: Aztec City — Temple Base
6036.description: A massive stepped pyramid dominates the city. Stairs climb steeply toward the summit.

6037.name: Aztec City — Temple Summit
6037.description: The top of the pyramid. An altar stained dark. The view of the city is breathtaking.

6038.name: Dusty Trail
6038.description: A dirt road through scrubland. Tumbleweeds roll past. Vultures circle overhead.

6039.name: Frontier Town — Main Street
6039.description: A one-street town. Saloon, general store, sheriff's office. A tumbleweed rolls past on cue.

6040.name: Frontier Town — Saloon
6040.description: Swinging doors, a piano player, and whiskey that could strip paint. Cards are dealt in the back.

6041.name: Frontier Town — Sheriff's Office
6041.description: Wanted posters cover the wall. A jail cell in the back. The sheriff's badge collects dust.

6042.name: Frontier Town — Stable
6042.description: Horses snort and stamp. The smell of hay and leather. A good horse is worth more than gold.

6043.name: Canyon — Rim
6043.description: A vast canyon stretches below. Layers of red and orange rock. A rope bridge spans the narrowest point.

6044.name: 1940s City — Street
6044.description: Art deco buildings and vintage cars. Big band music drifts from a dance hall. The war is overseas.

6045.name: 1940s City — Dance Hall
6045.description: Couples swing dance under a glittering ball. The music is loud and joyful. Tomorrow they ship out.

6046.name: 1940s City — War Office
6046.description: Maps with pins. Telegraphs clicking. The weight of decisions that cost lives.

6047.name: 1940s City — Train Station
6047.description: Steam engines and tearful goodbyes. Soldiers board with brave faces and terrified eyes.

6048.name: Prehistoric — Savanna
6048.description: Tall grass stretches to the horizon. A herd of mammoths moves in the distance. The sky is impossibly blue.

6049.name: Prehistoric — Cave
6049.description: A cave with paintings on the walls. Handprints and hunting scenes. The first art.

6050.name: Prehistoric — Tar Pits
6050.description: Bubbling black tar. Bones of ancient creatures protrude from the surface. The smell is acrid.

6051.name: Future Fragment — Ruins
6051.description: A city from a future that never happened. Hovercars rusted in mid-air. Plants reclaim everything.

6052.name: Future Fragment — AI Core
6052.description: A still-functioning AI in a dead city. It asks questions about a world it can no longer see.

6100.name: Atlantis — Dome Entrance
6100.description: A glass dome rises from the ocean floor. Air fills it impossibly. Coral grows on ancient architecture.

6101.name: Atlantis — Market District
6101.description: Underwater market stalls preserved in stasis. Goods from a civilization that mastered the sea.

6102.name: Atlantis — Central Plaza
6102.description: A grand plaza with a fountain that flows upward. Bioluminescent fish swim through the air.

6103.name: Atlantis — Temple of Poseidon
6103.description: A temple of blue marble. Tridents line the walls. The god's throne is empty but warm.

6104.name: Atlantis — Library
6104.description: Crystal tablets containing all Atlantean knowledge. The language shifts to be readable.

6105.name: Atlantis — Power Core
6105.description: The engine that keeps the dome intact. It's failing. Slowly. Centuries left, but still.

6106.name: Atlantis — Royal Palace
6106.description: Opulent halls of pearl and gold. The last king left a note: 'We chose to sink.'

6107.name: El Dorado — Jungle Approach
6107.description: The jungle parts to reveal golden light. A city of gold, hidden for millennia.

6108.name: El Dorado — Golden Gate
6108.description: Gates of solid gold, twenty feet tall. They open at a touch. No one has touched them in ages.

6109.name: El Dorado — Main Avenue
6109.description: A street paved with gold. Buildings of gold. Even the trees have golden leaves. It's blinding.

6110.name: El Dorado — Temple
6110.description: The central temple. Gold and jade. The altar holds a single emerald the size of a head.

6111.name: El Dorado — Treasury
6111.description: If the city is gold, this is platinum. The wealth of an empire concentrated in one room.

6112.name: El Dorado — Sacrifice Pit
6112.description: A pit where offerings were made. Gold statues of the sacrificed line the edges. Their faces are peaceful.

6113.name: Lemuria — Crystal Spire
6113.description: A tower of living crystal that grows from the earth. Lemurian technology — organic and alive.

6114.name: Lemuria — Thought Gardens
6114.description: Plants that grow from ideas. Think of something and it blooms. Be careful what you think.

6115.name: Lemuria — Harmony Chamber
6115.description: A room that resonates with your life force. Stand here and hear the music of your soul.

6116.name: Lemuria — The Akashic Record
6116.description: Every event that ever happened, recorded in crystal. Past, present, and future. All accessible.

6117.name: Lemuria — Ascension Point
6117.description: Where the Lemurians transcended physical form. The air shimmers with their residual presence.

6118.name: Shangri-La — Valley
6118.description: A hidden valley of eternal spring. People here don't age. They've been waiting for visitors.

6119.name: Shangri-La — Monastery
6119.description: A peaceful monastery where masters teach the secrets of immortality. The price is staying forever.

6120.name: Shangri-La — Peak
6120.description: The highest point of the hidden valley. From here, you can see all of time laid out like a map.

3001.name: Penthouse — Balcony
3001.description: Rain hammers the glass railing. The city spreads below like a circuit board. Someone left a cigarette burning in the ashtray.

3002.name: Penthouse — Interior
3002.description: White carpet, modern art, a bar stocked with top-shelf bourbon. The kind of place where deals are made.

3003.name: Uptown — Gallery Row
3003.description: Art galleries with pretentious names. The paintings cost more than most people make in a year.

3004.name: Uptown — Main Street
3004.description: Clean sidewalks, doormen, luxury cars. The rain even seems cleaner up here.

3005.name: The Continental Hotel
3005.description: A grand hotel with a strict no-violence policy. Everyone knows the rules. Everyone follows them.

3006.name: Uptown — Park
3006.description: A manicured park with gas lamps. Couples walk under umbrellas. It almost feels safe.

3007.name: Midtown — West
3007.description: Office buildings and parking garages. The 9-to-5 crowd has gone home. Only the cleaners remain.

3008.name: Midtown — Newspaper Row
3008.description: The offices of the Daily Chronicle. A light burns in the editor's window. Always a story breaking.

3009.name: Midtown — Central
3009.description: The business district. Banks, law firms, and the kind of restaurants that require reservations.

3010.name: Midtown — Courthouse
3010.description: A neoclassical building with blind justice on top. The scales have been broken for years.

3011.name: Midtown — Police Station
3011.description: A squat brick building. Cops come and go. The good ones look tired. The bad ones look comfortable.

3012.name: Rain-Soaked Alley — West
3012.description: A narrow passage between buildings. Rain cascades from fire escapes above. A cat knocks over a trash can.

3013.name: Jazz Club — The Blue Note
3013.description: Smoky interior, dim lights, a saxophone crying in the corner. The bourbon is cheap and the music is priceless.

3014.name: Downtown — Main Drag
3014.description: The line between respectable and dangerous. Pawn shops next to law offices. Everyone watches everyone.

3015.name: Downtown — Intersection
3015.description: A busy crossroads. Taxis splash through puddles. A newsboy hawks papers: 'MURDER ON THE WATERFRONT!'

3016.name: Downtown — East Side
3016.description: Cheaper rent, harder people. A laundromat that's definitely a front. A diner that never closes.

3017.name: PI Office — Building
3017.description: A five-story walkup with a flickering neon sign: 'INVESTIGATIONS.' Third floor, door on the left.

3018.name: PI Office — Interior
3018.description: A cluttered desk, a bottle in the drawer, a gun in the other drawer. The phone never rings with good news.

3019.name: Back Alley — Dead End
3019.description: The alley ends at a brick wall. Graffiti reads: 'SNITCHES GET STITCHES.' A dumpster provides cover.

3020.name: The Speakeasy
3020.description: Behind a bookshelf in a barbershop. The password changes weekly. The gin never does.

3021.name: Chinatown — Gate
3021.description: A red arch marks the entrance. Paper lanterns sway in the rain. The smell of dim sum and incense.

3022.name: Chinatown — Market
3022.description: Narrow streets packed with stalls. Fish tanks, herb shops, and a fortune teller who's never wrong.

3023.name: Chinatown — Temple
3023.description: A small Buddhist temple. Incense smoke curls upward. The monk sees everything and says nothing.

3024.name: The Docks — North
3024.description: Warehouses line the waterfront. Fog rolls in off the water. Foghorns sound in the distance.

3025.name: The Docks — West Pier
3025.description: A rotting wooden pier. Fishing boats creak at their moorings. The water is black and cold.

3026.name: The Docks — Warehouse Row
3026.description: Identical warehouses. One of them is always being loaded at 3 AM. Nobody asks what's inside.

3027.name: The Docks — Central
3027.description: The main dock area. Cargo ships from distant ports. Longshoremen smoke and watch.

3028.name: The Docks — Fish Market
3028.description: Even at night, the smell is overwhelming. Crates of ice and dead fish. A good place to hide a body.

3029.name: The Docks — East Pier
3029.description: A newer pier with a yacht club. The rich keep their boats here. Armed guards patrol.

3030.name: Lighthouse — Base
3030.description: An old lighthouse at the end of a breakwater. The light still turns, but nobody maintains it.

3031.name: The Tenderloin — North
3031.description: The bad part of town. Neon signs for adult establishments. Dealers on every corner.

3032.name: The Tenderloin — Center
3032.description: Rock bottom. Flophouses, needle exchanges, and broken dreams. The rain washes nothing clean.

3033.name: The Tenderloin — South
3033.description: A burned-out building that used to be a school. Now it's a squat. Campfires glow in the windows.

3034.name: Underground Gambling Den
3034.description: Behind a meat locker in a butcher shop. Poker, dice, fights. The house always wins.

3035.name: The Mob Boss's Club
3035.description: A legitimate business on paper. Velvet ropes, expensive suits, and the smell of fear.

3036.name: Abandoned Subway — Entrance
3036.description: A boarded-up subway entrance. The boards have been pried apart. Stairs descend into darkness.

3037.name: Abandoned Subway — Platform
3037.description: An old station frozen in time. Advertisements from decades ago. Rats rule here now.

3038.name: Abandoned Subway — Tunnel
3038.description: The tunnel stretches into blackness. Water drips. Echoes play tricks on your ears.

3039.name: The Catacombs — Entry
3039.description: Beneath the subway, older tunnels. Brick and bone. The city was built on the dead.

3040.name: The Catacombs — Deep
3040.description: Skulls line the walls in neat rows. Someone has been here recently — fresh candle wax on the floor.

3041.name: Industrial District — West
3041.description: Abandoned factories from the boom years. Broken windows stare like dead eyes.

3042.name: Industrial District — Center
3042.description: A functioning steel mill. The night shift works in hellish orange light.

3043.name: Industrial District — East
3043.description: Rail yards where freight trains sit idle. A good place to hop a train out of this city.

3044.name: The Bridge — West End
3044.description: A massive suspension bridge spanning the river. The fog is so thick you can't see the other side.

3045.name: The Bridge — Center
3045.description: Halfway across. The wind is brutal. The water far below is invisible in the fog.

3046.name: The Bridge — East End
3046.description: The far side of the bridge. A different jurisdiction. The cops here are worse.

3047.name: Cemetery — Gate
3047.description: Wrought iron gates stand open. The cemetery stretches up a hill. Angels weep in stone.

3048.name: Cemetery — Hill
3048.description: The top of the cemetery hill. The city glitters below. Fresh flowers on a grave with no name.

3049.name: Cemetery — Crypt
3049.description: A family crypt built into the hillside. The door is unlocked. It shouldn't be.

3100.name: Catacombs — Entrance
3100.description: Stone stairs descend from the cemetery crypt. The air is cold and still. Bones line the walls.

3101.name: Catacombs — West Passage
3101.description: A narrow tunnel. Skulls are stacked in neat rows. Candle niches are empty.

3102.name: Catacombs — Central Hall
3102.description: A wider chamber. Pillars of stacked bones support the ceiling. It's architecturally impressive.

3103.name: Catacombs — East Passage
3103.description: The tunnel curves. Newer bones here — less than a century old. The tradition continues.

3104.name: Catacombs — Dead End
3104.description: The tunnel ends. But the wall here sounds hollow when you knock.

3105.name: Catacombs — Shrine
3105.description: A small altar with fresh flowers. Someone still visits. A name is carved: 'REMEMBER.'

3106.name: Catacombs — Crossroads
3106.description: Four tunnels meet. Each is marked with a different symbol. One smells of incense.

3107.name: Catacombs — Flooded Section
3107.description: Water fills the tunnel to ankle depth. It's cold and dark. Something ripples ahead.

3108.name: Catacombs — Collapsed
3108.description: A cave-in blocks most of the passage. A gap at the top is barely passable.

3109.name: Secret Room — Mob Archive
3109.description: Behind the hollow wall: filing cabinets of criminal records. Every crime family documented.

3110.name: Catacombs — Ritual Chamber
3110.description: A circular room with symbols on the floor. Candles burn in a circle. Fresh blood on the altar.

3111.name: Catacombs — Ossuary
3111.description: An artistic arrangement of bones. Chandeliers of femurs. Walls of skulls. Macabre beauty.

3112.name: Catacombs — Underground River
3112.description: A river flows through a natural cave. A boat is tied to a post. It could carry two.

3113.name: Catacombs — Exit to Docks
3113.description: A tunnel that emerges at the waterfront. Used by smugglers for generations.

3114.name: Catacombs — Deep Tombs
3114.description: Older tombs. The inscriptions are in Latin. These are the city's founders.

3115.name: Catacombs — The Vault
3115.description: A sealed chamber. The lock is modern — someone added it recently. What's worth protecting down here?

3116.name: Catacombs — Forgotten Chapel
3116.description: A tiny underground chapel. Pews for twelve. The crucifix is inverted. Not a good sign.

3117.name: Catacombs — Ancient Passage
3117.description: Pre-city tunnels. The stonework is Roman. This city is older than anyone knows.

3118.name: Catacombs — Roman Bath
3118.description: An ancient bathhouse, still partially intact. The water is warm from geothermal heat.

3119.name: Catacombs — Deepest Point
3119.description: The lowest accessible point. A door of ancient bronze. No keyhole. No handle. Just a face.

2001.name: MegaCorp Tower — Lobby
2001.description: A sterile white lobby with holographic receptionists. Security scanners line the entrance. Everything smells like money.

2002.name: MegaCorp Tower — Elevator
2002.description: A glass elevator shaft. The city sprawls below through the transparent floor. Going down feels like falling.

2003.name: Skybridge — West
2003.description: A glass-enclosed bridge between towers. The city is a carpet of neon far below. Wind buffets the structure.

2004.name: MegaCorp Tower — Server Floor
2004.description: Rows of humming server racks stretch into darkness. The temperature is freezing. LEDs blink like stars.

2005.name: MegaCorp Tower — Executive Suite
2005.description: Minimalist luxury. A desk of polished obsidian faces a wall-sized window. The chair is still warm.

2006.name: Rooftop Garden
2006.description: A manicured garden atop a skyscraper. Real plants — a fortune's worth. A drone waters the orchids.

2007.name: Apartment Block — Hallway
2007.description: A long corridor of identical doors. Flickering fluorescent lights. Someone is arguing behind door 47.

2008.name: Skybridge — Center
2008.description: The midpoint of the bridge. A homeless man has set up camp here with a cardboard sign: 'THE END IS LOADING.'

2009.name: Transit Hub — Upper
2009.description: A monorail station. Holographic schedules flicker. The next train arrives in 3 minutes. Or never.

2010.name: Noodle Bar — 47th Floor
2010.description: A tiny ramen shop crammed between office buildings. The chef is a robot. The noodles are perfect.

2011.name: Hacker's Den
2011.description: A cluttered apartment filled with screens and cables. Energy drink cans form a small fortress.

2012.name: Neon Street — West End
2012.description: The street dead-ends at a concrete wall covered in graffiti. A fire escape leads up.

2013.name: Neon Street — Market
2013.description: Street vendors sell everything from bootleg chips to synthetic organs. No questions asked.

2014.name: Neon Street — Main
2014.description: The main drag. Neon signs in every language compete for attention. Rain falls through holographic advertisements.

2015.name: Neon Street — Central
2015.description: The busiest intersection. Crowds flow around you like water. A street preacher screams about the singularity.

2016.name: Neon Street — East
2016.description: The street narrows here. Cheaper establishments. A pawn shop, a clinic, a bar with no name.

2017.name: Neon Street — Dead End
2017.description: The street ends at a chain-link fence. Beyond it, the ruins of the old city. Something moves in the rubble.

2018.name: The Ruins — Edge
2018.description: Collapsed buildings from before the corporate takeover. Scavengers pick through the debris.

2019.name: Back Alley — West
2019.description: A narrow alley between buildings. Dumpsters overflow. A cat with chrome eyes watches you.

2020.name: The Byte Club
2020.description: A underground fight club. Augmented fighters trade blows in a cage. The crowd roars.

2021.name: Chrome Avenue — North
2021.description: A wider street lined with body modification shops. Neon signs advertise the latest implants.

2022.name: The Crossroads
2022.description: A major intersection with a broken traffic light. It always shows red. Nobody stops anyway.

2023.name: Chrome Avenue — South
2023.description: More mod shops, but seedier. Back-alley surgeons. 'Discount Augments — Only Slightly Used.'

2024.name: Abandoned Warehouse
2024.description: A cavernous space. Pigeons roost in the rafters. Tire tracks suggest recent vehicle activity.

2025.name: The Ruins — Deep
2025.description: Deeper into the collapsed old city. The ground is unstable. Feral dogs hunt in packs here.

2026.name: Parking Garage — Level 1
2026.description: A multi-story garage. Most vehicles are stripped shells. Oil stains mark where others once sat.

2027.name: The Red Light District — North
2027.description: Holographic dancers advertise clubs. The bass from inside shakes your chest. Everything is for sale.

2028.name: The Red Light District — Center
2028.description: The heart of the pleasure district. Sensory overload. Every vice has a neon sign.

2029.name: The Red Light District — South
2029.description: The district fades into darker territory. The establishments here don't advertise.

2030.name: Junkyard — Gate
2030.description: Mountains of discarded tech behind a chain-link fence. A guard dog — mechanical — patrols.

2031.name: Sewer Access — West
2031.description: A maintenance hatch leads down into the city's underbelly. The smell is indescribable.

2032.name: Parking Garage — Basement
2032.description: The lowest level. No lights work. Water drips from the ceiling. Perfect for an ambush.

2033.name: Underground Market
2033.description: A black market operating in an old subway station. Illegal weapons, drugs, stolen data.

2034.name: The Undernet Cafe
2034.description: A dingy cafe where hackers jack into the net. The coffee is terrible. The bandwidth is incredible.

2035.name: Clinic — Back Room
2035.description: An unlicensed medical facility. The doctor has steady hands and no questions. Cash only.

2036.name: Junkyard — Interior
2036.description: Towers of scrap metal and dead electronics. Useful parts if you know what to look for.

2037.name: Junkyard — Deep
2037.description: The back of the junkyard. Something has built a nest here from car parts and wire.

2038.name: Factory District — West
2038.description: Smokestacks belch toxic fumes. Automated factories run 24/7. No workers needed.

2039.name: Factory District — Center
2039.description: The main factory floor visible through grimy windows. Robots assemble robots. Recursive manufacturing.

2040.name: Factory District — East
2040.description: Loading docks where autonomous trucks come and go. Crates stamped with corporate logos.

2041.name: Power Plant — Exterior
2041.description: A massive fusion reactor hums behind reinforced walls. Warning signs in twelve languages.

2042.name: Power Plant — Interior
2042.description: The reactor core glows blue-white. The heat is intense. Maintenance drones buzz around it.

2043.name: Waste Processing
2043.description: Where the city's garbage goes to die. Conveyor belts sort recyclables. The rest gets incinerated.

2044.name: Abandoned Lab
2044.description: A corporate research facility. Cleared out in a hurry. Broken glass and scattered papers remain.

2045.name: Abandoned Lab — Deep
2045.description: The inner labs. Containment pods line the walls. Most are empty. Most.

2046.name: Server Farm — Entrance
2046.description: A nondescript building with massive cooling systems. The digital heart of the grid.

2047.name: Server Farm — Core
2047.description: The central processing hub. Petabytes of data flow through here every second. The AI lives here.

2048.name: Highway — On-Ramp
2048.description: A crumbling highway on-ramp. The road above is cracked and overgrown. No traffic anymore.

2049.name: Highway — Overpass
2049.description: The elevated highway. Abandoned vehicles rust in place. The city skyline glitters in the distance.

2050.name: Highway — Off-Ramp
2050.description: The highway descends back to ground level. A makeshift settlement of tarps and shipping containers.

2051.name: Shantytown — Edge
2051.description: The corporate city ends here. Beyond is a sprawl of improvised shelters. The forgotten people.

2052.name: Shantytown — Center
2052.description: A community built from scraps. Despite everything, children play and food is shared.

2053.name: Shantytown — Market
2053.description: A barter economy. People trade skills, food, and salvage. No credits accepted.

2054.name: The Wasteland — Edge
2054.description: Beyond the shantytown, nothing. Irradiated ground from the old wars. Only the desperate go further.

2055.name: The Wasteland — Bunker
2055.description: A pre-war bunker, half-buried in toxic sand. The door is ajar. Someone has been here recently.

2100.name: Deep Net — Access Point
2100.description: You jack in. Reality dissolves into data streams. The digital world renders around you in wireframe.

2101.name: Data Highway — West
2101.description: A river of pure information flows past. Packets of data zip by like glowing fish.

2102.name: Data Highway — Central
2102.description: The main data artery. Traffic is heavy. Firewalls loom like fortress walls in the distance.

2103.name: Data Highway — East
2103.description: The highway branches. One path leads to corporate servers. The other to the dark net.

2104.name: Abandoned Server — Lobby
2104.description: A derelict virtual space. Corrupted textures and broken geometry. Someone lived here once.

2105.name: Abandoned Server — Core
2105.description: The server's processing core. Data ghosts flicker — echoes of deleted programs.

2106.name: The Firewall — Exterior
2106.description: A massive wall of code blocks the path. ICE programs patrol its surface like sharks.

2107.name: The Firewall — Breach
2107.description: A hole in the firewall. Someone punched through. The edges still spark with broken code.

2108.name: Corporate Server — Outer
2108.description: Beyond the firewall. Clean, sterile virtual architecture. Everything is monitored.

2109.name: Dark Net — Entry
2109.description: The other path. No rules here. The geometry is non-Euclidean. Viruses swim freely.

2110.name: Dark Net — Market
2110.description: A black market in cyberspace. Stolen data, illegal programs, digital weapons.

2111.name: Dark Net — Arena
2111.description: A virtual combat arena. Programs fight to the death. Spectators bet in cryptocurrency.

2112.name: Corporate Server — Vault
2112.description: The data vault. Encrypted files worth billions. The security here is lethal.

2113.name: Corporate Server — AI Chamber
2113.description: The corporate AI's home. It manifests as a perfect geometric shape. It sees you.

2114.name: Virus Nest
2114.description: A corrupted zone where viruses breed. The code here is infectious. Don't stay long.

2115.name: The Archive
2115.description: A vast library of all human knowledge, digitized. Accessible to those who can find it.

2116.name: Ghost in the Machine
2116.description: A sentient program that escaped deletion. It hides here, afraid and angry.

2117.name: The Void — Digital
2117.description: Where deleted data goes. Fragments of destroyed files drift like digital snow.

2118.name: The Void — Core
2118.description: The deepest layer. The original code of the network is visible here. The foundation of everything.

2119.name: The Backdoor
2119.description: A hidden exit point. It leads somewhere that shouldn't exist. A developer's secret.

20.name: The Pinnacle
20.description: The highest point of the Nexus. A single chair faces outward into the void between worlds. Someone left a half-finished drink here.

16.name: The Afterlife Gate
16.description: A pale archway stands here, its surface like still water. Beyond it, ghostly lights drift upward. A sign reads: 'The Afterlife — For the Worthy and the Dead.'

6.name: Gateway Chamber — Upper
6.description: The upper archway opens onto a staircase that climbs into starlight. Floating islands are visible in the distance. A sign reads: 'Ethereal Drift — Between the Stars.'

19.name: Nexus — Upper East
19.description: A balcony overlooks the central chamber from above. The view is dizzying.

12.name: The Bulletin Board
12.description: A large cork board dominates the wall here, covered in notices, bounties, and requests. Adventurers gather to read the latest postings.

2.name: Gateway Chamber — North
2.description: The northern archway pulses with golden light. Beyond it, you glimpse rolling green hills and castle spires. A sign reads: 'The Shattered Crown — Realm of Sword and Sorcery.'

7.name: Gateway Chamber — Northeast
7.description: A shimmering portal shows scenes from different time periods flickering rapidly. A sign reads: 'Forgotten Epoch — History Unbound.'

15.name: The Observatory
15.description: A glass dome reveals the void between realms. Stars and distant worlds drift past. Telescopes of various designs point in every direction.

8.name: The Bazaar — West Wing
8.description: A bustling marketplace fills this wide corridor. Merchants hawk wares from a dozen different worlds. The smell of exotic spices mixes with machine oil.

5.name: Gateway Chamber — West
5.description: The western archway glows with orange firelight. Explosions and gunfire echo faintly. A sign reads: 'Blood & Chrome — No Pain, No Gain.'

1.name: The Nexus of Echoes — Central Chamber
1.description: A vast circular chamber of polished obsidian. Six archways radiate outward, each shimmering with a different colored light. The ceiling is lost in darkness above, but faint stars seem to drift there.

4.name: Gateway Chamber — East
4.description: The eastern archway drips with perpetual rain. Street lamps and saxophone music drift through. A sign reads: 'Midnight Rain — Where Shadows Have Secrets.'

9.name: The Bazaar — East Wing
9.description: More market stalls line this corridor. A weapons dealer polishes a gleaming blade while a tech vendor demonstrates holographic displays.

14.name: Armorer's Workshop
14.description: The ring of hammer on anvil fills this smoky room. A stocky smith works at a forge that burns with supernatural heat.

10.name: Training Hall — Entrance
10.description: A reinforced doorway leads into a large open space. The sounds of combat echo from within. A sign reads: 'All skill levels welcome. No killing.'

3.name: Gateway Chamber — South
3.description: The southern archway crackles with blue-white electricity. Neon signs and holographic advertisements flicker beyond. A sign reads: 'Neon Grid — The Digital Frontier.'

11.name: The Healer's Sanctum
11.description: Soft blue light fills this domed room. Crystal formations pulse with restorative energy. A robed figure tends to the wounded.

21.name: Storage Cellar
21.description: Crates and barrels are stacked against the walls. Most are labeled with destinations that no longer exist.

17.name: Nexus — Southwest Corridor
17.description: A quiet corridor connecting the training areas to the lower levels. Torches flicker in iron sconces.

13.name: The Undercity Entrance
13.description: A heavy iron grate in the floor has been pried open. A ladder descends into darkness. The smell of damp stone and worse things rises from below.

18.name: Nexus — Southeast Corridor
18.description: A corridor lined with memorial plaques. Names of fallen heroes are etched in silver.

22.name: The Quiet Room
22.description: A small meditation chamber. The walls absorb all sound. Perfect silence.

24.name: Forgotten Storeroom
24.description: Dust covers everything. Crates marked with symbols no one remembers. A rat watches you from atop a barrel.

23.name: Nexus — Deep Basement
23.description: Below the main level. The walls here are older — rougher stone, no polish. Something was here before the Nexus was built.

25.name: The Old Well
25.description: A stone well sits in the center of this room. The water is black and still. Sometimes it ripples when nothing has touched it.

1001.name: Mountain Pass — Summit
1001.description: The wind howls at this narrow pass between two peaks. Snow whips horizontally. The path descends south toward greener lands.

1002.name: Eagle's Nest
1002.description: A rocky outcrop where massive eagles nest. Bones of large animals litter the ground. The view stretches for miles.

1003.name: Dark Forest — Deep
1003.description: Ancient trees block all sunlight. Mushrooms glow faintly on rotting logs. Something moves in the undergrowth.

1004.name: Mountain Pass — Descent
1004.description: The rocky path winds downward through scrub brush. A stream trickles alongside.

1005.name: Forest Clearing
1005.description: A break in the canopy lets sunlight through. Wildflowers carpet the ground. A stone circle stands in the center.

1006.name: Hermit's Cave
1006.description: A shallow cave with signs of habitation — a bedroll, dried herbs, a small fire pit.

1007.name: Dark Forest — Western Edge
1007.description: The trees thin here, revealing rolling hills to the west. Claw marks scar the bark.

1008.name: Dark Forest — Crossroads
1008.description: Two paths cross here. A wooden signpost points in four directions, but the writing has faded.

1009.name: Forest Road — North
1009.description: A dirt road cuts through the forest. Cart tracks suggest regular traffic.

1010.name: Enchanted Grove
1010.description: The trees here shimmer with inner light. Pixies dart between branches. The air tastes like honey.

1011.name: Abandoned Mill
1011.description: A watermill sits beside a dry streambed. The wheel is broken. Grain sacks rot inside.

1012.name: Bandit Camp — Outskirts
1012.description: Trampled ground and old campfires. Someone has been living here recently.

1013.name: Rolling Hills — West
1013.description: Green hills stretch westward under a grey sky. Sheep graze in the distance.

1014.name: Farmstead — Fields
1014.description: Wheat fields sway in the breeze. A scarecrow watches with button eyes.

1015.name: King's Road — North Gate
1015.description: The cobblestone road leads to a massive stone gatehouse. Guards in silver tabards check travelers.

1016.name: King's Road — Bend
1016.description: The road curves here around a large oak tree. A bench sits beneath it.

1017.name: Eastern Trail
1017.description: A narrow path winds eastward through rocky terrain. It looks less traveled.

1018.name: Bandit Camp — Center
1018.description: A ring of tents surrounds a large fire pit. Stolen goods are piled carelessly.

1019.name: Bandit Camp — Leader's Tent
1019.description: A larger tent with a crude throne made of shields. Maps and plans are pinned to a board.

1020.name: Town Square — North
1020.description: The northern edge of the town square. A fountain depicts a knight slaying a dragon.

1021.name: Castle Street
1021.description: A wide avenue leading toward the castle. Noble houses line both sides.

1022.name: The Prancing Pony Inn
1022.description: A warm tavern with a roaring fire. The smell of ale and roasting meat fills the air.

1023.name: Alchemist's Shop
1023.description: Bubbling vials and strange smells. The alchemist peers at you through thick spectacles.

1024.name: Eastern Wall — Tower
1024.description: A guard tower built into the town wall. Archers watch the eastern approach.

1025.name: Western Gate
1025.description: The western gate of the town. Less grand than the north gate, used mainly by farmers.

1026.name: Market Street — West
1026.description: Vendors sell vegetables, cloth, and pottery. A bard plays a lute on the corner.

1027.name: Town Square — Center
1027.description: The heart of the town. A large notice board stands here. Citizens go about their business.

1028.name: Market Street — East
1028.description: Weapon smiths and leather workers ply their trade here. The clang of metal rings out.

1029.name: Temple of the Dawn
1029.description: A white stone temple with stained glass windows. Soft chanting echoes within.

1030.name: Graveyard — Gate
1030.description: An iron gate leads into a misty graveyard. The hinges creak ominously.

1031.name: Residential — West
1031.description: Modest homes with thatched roofs. Children play in the street.

1032.name: Town Square — South
1032.description: The southern edge of the square. A stocks stands here, currently empty.

1033.name: The Rusty Nail — Tavern
1033.description: A rougher establishment. The clientele look like they'd stab you for a copper.

1034.name: Thieves' Alley
1034.description: A narrow passage between buildings. It smells of refuse. Eyes watch from the shadows.

1035.name: Graveyard — Interior
1035.description: Headstones lean at odd angles. Fog clings to the ground. A mausoleum stands at the back.

1036.name: Graveyard — Mausoleum
1036.description: A stone building sealed with a heavy door. Scratching sounds come from within.

1037.name: Farmstead — Barn
1037.description: A large barn filled with hay. Animals shift nervously in their stalls.

1038.name: South Gate
1038.description: The southern gate opens onto the King's Road heading south. Trade caravans wait here.

1039.name: Castle — Outer Ward
1039.description: The castle's outer courtyard. Soldiers drill in formation. Stables line the west wall.

1040.name: Castle — Inner Ward
1040.description: The inner courtyard. A well sits in the center. The keep looms above.

1041.name: Castle — Great Hall
1041.description: A massive hall with a vaulted ceiling. The king's throne sits empty on a raised dais.

1042.name: Castle — Dungeon Entrance
1042.description: Stone stairs descend into darkness. The smell of damp and despair rises.

1043.name: King's Road — South
1043.description: The road stretches southward through open plains. Distant mountains mark the horizon.

1044.name: Castle — Armory
1044.description: Racks of weapons and armor line the walls. A quartermaster takes inventory.

1045.name: Castle — Tower Base
1045.description: The base of the tallest tower. Spiral stairs wind upward into gloom.

1046.name: Castle — Library
1046.description: Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves. Dust motes drift in shafts of light. A scholar mutters to himself.

1047.name: Castle — Dungeon Cells
1047.description: Iron-barred cells line a damp corridor. Most are empty. Most.

1048.name: Crossroads — Southern Plains
1048.description: The road forks here. South leads to distant villages. East enters marshland.

1049.name: Castle — Secret Passage
1049.description: A narrow passage behind a bookcase. Cobwebs suggest it hasn't been used in years.

1050.name: Castle — Tower Top
1050.description: The top of the tower. A telescope points skyward. The entire kingdom is visible from here.

1051.name: Castle — Wizard's Study
1051.description: A cluttered room of arcane apparatus. A crystal ball sits on the desk, clouded and dark.

1052.name: Castle — Deep Dungeon
1052.description: The lowest level. Water drips from the ceiling. Something large breathes in the darkness.

1053.name: Swamp — Western Edge
1053.description: The ground becomes soft and treacherous. Cattails and dead trees mark the transition to marshland.

1054.name: Southern Plains
1054.description: Flat grassland stretches in every direction. The wind carries the smell of rain.

1055.name: Ruined Watchtower
1055.description: A crumbling stone tower. Only two walls still stand. Vines have claimed the rest.

1056.name: Swamp — Path
1056.description: A narrow path of stepping stones crosses the murky water. One wrong step and you're swimming.

1057.name: Witch's Hut
1057.description: A crooked house on chicken-leg stilts. Smoke rises from the chimney. The door has no handle.

1058.name: Ancient Ruins — Entrance
1058.description: Crumbling stone pillars mark the entrance to something old. Carved symbols cover every surface.

1059.name: Ancient Ruins — Hall
1059.description: A long hall of fallen columns. The ceiling has collapsed in places, letting in shafts of light.

1060.name: Ancient Ruins — Sanctum
1060.description: A circular chamber at the heart of the ruins. An altar stands in the center, stained dark.

1100.name: Dungeon Descent — Top
1100.description: Stone stairs spiral downward into the earth. The air grows cold and damp. Torches gutter.

1101.name: Dungeon — Guard Room
1101.description: An abandoned guard post. A table with cards still dealt. The guards left in a hurry.

1102.name: Dungeon — West Cells
1102.description: Iron-barred cells line the corridor. Scratching sounds come from the darkest one.

1103.name: Dungeon — Central Hall
1103.description: A wide corridor with vaulted ceilings. Water drips from above. Chains hang from the walls.

1104.name: Dungeon — East Cells
1104.description: More cells. One has been broken open from the inside. The bars are bent outward.

1105.name: Dungeon — Torture Chamber
1105.description: Implements of pain hang on the walls. A rack, an iron maiden, thumbscrews. All well-maintained.

1106.name: Oubliette — Edge
1106.description: A pit in the floor drops into darkness. A rope ladder hangs over the edge. It looks frayed.

1107.name: Crypt — Entrance
1107.description: Stone sarcophagi line the walls. The names are those of ancient kings. One lid is askew.

1108.name: Crypt — Central Chamber
1108.description: The largest crypt. A single ornate coffin on a raised platform. Candles burn with blue flame.

1109.name: Crypt — East Wing
1109.description: More tombs. These are older. The inscriptions are in a dead language.

1110.name: Secret Laboratory
1110.description: Hidden behind a false tomb. Alchemical equipment and forbidden texts. Someone studies necromancy.

1111.name: Oubliette — Bottom
1111.description: The bottom of the pit. Bones and forgotten prisoners. A tunnel leads deeper.

1112.name: Underground Lake — Shore
1112.description: A vast underground lake. The water is perfectly still and black. Something glows in the depths.

1113.name: Underground Lake — Island
1113.description: A small island in the lake. A stone chest sits here, sealed with magical wards.

1114.name: Fungal Cavern
1114.description: Massive mushrooms grow here, some taller than a person. The air is thick with spores.

1115.name: Crystal Cave
1115.description: Natural crystals grow from every surface, casting rainbow light. Beautiful and disorienting.

1116.name: Dragon's Lair — Approach
1116.description: The tunnel widens. Scorch marks blacken the walls. The temperature rises sharply.

1117.name: Dragon's Lair — Hoard
1117.description: Mountains of gold and treasure. A massive shape breathes in the darkness beyond.

1118.name: Dragon's Lair — Nest
1118.description: Enormous eggs sit in a nest of melted gold. The dragon mother is never far.

1119.name: Dwarven Ruins — Gate
1119.description: Ancient dwarven construction. The stonework is flawless despite its age. Runes glow faintly.

1120.name: Dwarven Ruins — Forge
1120.description: A forge that still burns with magical fire. Dwarven tools lie ready. The smiths are long gone.

1121.name: Dwarven Ruins — Treasury
1121.description: The dwarven vault. Most has been looted. But the deepest chamber remains sealed.

1122.name: Dwarven Ruins — Throne Room
1122.description: A stone throne sized for a dwarf king. The crown still sits on the seat, waiting.

1123.name: The Sealed Door
1123.description: A door of black metal covered in warning runes. Every language says the same thing: DO NOT OPEN.

1124.name: Beyond the Seal
1124.description: Whatever was sealed away is gone. Only claw marks on the walls remain. Very large claw marks.

8001.name: Training Grounds — Entrance
8001.description: A large archway leads into a complex of training facilities. A sign reads: 'Push Beyond Your Limits.'

8002.name: Gravity Chamber — Lobby
8002.description: A waiting area outside sealed chambers. Monitors display the gravity levels inside. Some show 100x.

8003.name: Gravity Chamber — 2x
8003.description: The air feels heavy. Movement requires effort. A good starting point for gravity training.

8004.name: Gravity Chamber — 10x
8004.description: Every step is a struggle. Your body weighs ten times normal. Sweat pools on the floor instantly.

8005.name: Gravity Chamber — 50x
8005.description: Breathing is labor. Standing is triumph. The strongest warriors train here for minutes at a time.

8006.name: Obstacle Course — Start
8006.description: A complex obstacle course stretches ahead. Walls to climb, pits to jump, targets to hit.

8007.name: Obstacle Course — Mid
8007.description: Swinging pendulums and balance beams. One wrong step and you start over.

8008.name: Sparring Arena — Center
8008.description: A large circular arena with padded floors. Training partners of various skill levels wait.

8009.name: Sparring Arena — Advanced
8009.description: The advanced ring. No padding. The partners here don't pull punches.

8010.name: Meditation Chamber
8010.description: A perfectly silent room. Cushions on the floor. The walls absorb all sound and distraction.

8011.name: Obstacle Course — End
8011.description: The final stretch. Moving targets and timed gates. Your score is displayed on a board.

8012.name: Weights Room
8012.description: Racks of increasingly absurd weights. The heaviest ones have dents in the floor beneath them.

8013.name: Training Grounds — Central Hub
8013.description: The main crossroads of the training complex. Paths lead to different specializations.

8014.name: Target Range
8014.description: Ranged combat training. Targets at various distances. Some move. Some shoot back.

8015.name: Elemental Chamber — Fire
8015.description: A room where controlled flames test your resistance and reflexes. Don't stand still.

8016.name: Endurance Track
8016.description: A circular running track. The surface changes — sand, mud, ice, uphill. It never gets easier.

8017.name: Combat Simulator
8017.description: Holographic enemies appear and attack. Difficulty scales to your level. Defeat is non-lethal but painful.

8018.name: Elemental Chamber — Ice
8018.description: Sub-zero temperatures. Ice forms on everything. Train your body to resist the cold.

8019.name: Elemental Chamber — Lightning
8019.description: Electrical discharges arc between pylons. Dodge or endure. Both build strength.

8020.name: Recovery Room
8020.description: Healing pools and rest areas. Your body repairs faster here. Essential after intense training.

8021.name: The Gauntlet — Entrance
8021.description: A door marked 'THE GAUNTLET.' Beyond it, the ultimate training challenge. Few complete it.

8022.name: The Gauntlet — Phase 1
8022.description: Wave after wave of training constructs. They don't stop until you do.

8023.name: The Gauntlet — Phase 2
8023.description: Harder. Faster. The constructs adapt to your fighting style.

8024.name: The Gauntlet — Phase 3
8024.description: The final phase. A single opponent that matches your exact power level. Victory means growth.

8025.name: Hall of Records
8025.description: A wall of plaques showing the fastest Gauntlet completion times. Your name could be here.

7001.name: Undercity — Entry Shaft
7001.description: A vertical shaft with a rusty ladder. Light from above fades quickly. The smell hits you like a wall.

7002.name: Undercity — Landing
7002.description: The bottom of the shaft. Tunnels branch in multiple directions. Graffiti marks territory.

7003.name: Sewer Main — West
7003.description: A large tunnel with a channel of flowing waste. A narrow walkway runs along one side.

7004.name: Sewer Main — Junction
7004.description: Three tunnels meet here. The water is deeper. Something large splashed around the corner.

7005.name: Sewer Main — East
7005.description: The tunnel narrows. Pipes overhead drip constantly. Rats scatter at your approach.

7006.name: Maintenance Room
7006.description: A small room with valves and gauges. Someone has been sleeping here — a bedroll and empty cans.

7007.name: Collapsed Tunnel — West
7007.description: The tunnel has partially collapsed. Rubble blocks most of the passage. A gap remains.

7008.name: Mushroom Cavern
7008.description: A natural cave where bioluminescent mushrooms grow in clusters. The air is thick with spores.

7009.name: Underground River — Bank
7009.description: An underground river flows through a natural cavern. The water is surprisingly clean.

7010.name: Underground River — Bridge
7010.description: A makeshift bridge of planks and rope spans the river. It sways dangerously.

7011.name: Rat King's Domain
7011.description: A large chamber filled with refuse. Thousands of rats move as one organism. Their king watches.

7012.name: Forgotten Cistern
7012.description: A massive water storage chamber. Empty now. Echoes last forever in here.

7013.name: Smuggler's Cache
7013.description: A hidden room behind a false wall. Crates of contraband. Someone's retirement fund.

7014.name: The Depths — Upper
7014.description: Older tunnels. The stonework is different — pre-Nexus construction. Something was here first.

7015.name: The Depths — Chamber
7015.description: A circular chamber with pillars. Carvings in a language no one reads anymore.

7016.name: The Depths — Altar
7016.description: An ancient altar in the deepest chamber. Dark stains. The air vibrates with old power.

7017.name: Flooded Passage
7017.description: Water fills this tunnel to waist height. The current pulls southward. Cold.

7018.name: Undercity Market
7018.description: A black market in a widened tunnel. Stolen goods, information, and things that shouldn't exist.

7019.name: The Pit
7019.description: A natural sinkhole. Rope ladders descend into darkness. Fighters gather here for underground bouts.

7020.name: Cultist Hideout
7020.description: Robed figures gather around symbols drawn in chalk. They stop chanting when you enter.

7021.name: Abandoned Lab
7021.description: Someone was conducting experiments down here. Broken glass and chemical stains. Notes in frantic handwriting.

7022.name: Undercity — South Tunnel
7022.description: A long straight tunnel heading south. The walls are slick with moisture.

7023.name: The Hive
7023.description: Insectoid creatures have built a nest here from secreted resin. Eggs pulse with dim light.

7024.name: Crystal Cavern
7024.description: Natural crystals jut from every surface. They glow faintly. Beautiful and disorienting.

7025.name: Exit Shaft — South
7025.description: Another vertical shaft. This one leads up to somewhere in the Shattered Crown.

7026.name: The Warden's Room
7026.description: A sealed chamber. Something is imprisoned here. The door has locks on the outside.

7027.name: Undercity — Dead End
7027.description: The tunnel ends at a solid wall. But the wall is warm. And it pulses.
